goal: Turn the uploaded interview notes into a concise strategy memo draft for internal executives
scope: Use only the uploaded interview notes; produce a review-ready draft; do not publish or send externally
constraints: Keep the memo concise and business-oriented
Do not invent market data or claims not supported by the notes
Explicitly label uncertainty or weak evidence
Focus on key themes, risks, and recommended next steps
success_criteria: Groups insights into a small number of themes
Is readable by a leadership audience
Is ready for user review without requiring major restructuring

missing: Preferred memo length if stricter than a concise default
Company memo template if one is required

assumptions: Assume the audience is an internal leadership team
Assume a generic strategy memo structure is acceptable if no internal template is provided
Assume the user wants a draft rather than a final polished deliverable
completion_definition: Done when a concise review-ready strategy memo draft is produced from the uploaded notes
fallback_if_blocked: If template details are missing, produce a clean generic memo draft and label assumptions
